texto: Hi Paul! Last month I went to Canada. I took the plane from Lima and I arrived in Toronto. I stayed at a hotel for five days. I visited museums and I ate a lot of good food, but I had a headache the first day! I met new people and I practised my English every day. Next year, I'm going to study French too, because I want to live in Canada. See you soon, Joel.

preguntas.enunciado: Joel tuvo dolor de estómago el primer día.
¿Qué va a estudiar el próximo año?
